title: Resolution Requesting the Honorable Provincial Legal Counsel, Atty. Rodel Paderayon, to Assist the Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños, for Appropriate Legal Action for the Removal From Office of SK Chairperson Vinz Carlo D. Pombo of Barangay Bambang, Los Baños, Laguna. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 01/31/20)
